subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art the Lord of all names and Fashioner of the heavens! Deliver Thy loved ones from the prison of their foes
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مالک الاسمآء و فاطر السّمآء خلّص احبّآء من سجن اعدآء انّک سلطان القضآء و المشرق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
